languages.text: "Эта проблема мнимая, Вольный Торговец. Империум устроен оптимальным образом, и ваши неисчерпаемые ресурсы уже служат ему на благо, расширяя его границы и влияние на фронтире. Право, Нунциус, не ожидал от тебя подобной фривольности в суждениях".

"This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."
languages.original_text: "Эта проблема мнимая, Вольный Торговец. Империум устроен оптимальным образом, и ваши неисчерпаемые ресурсы уже служат ему на благо, расширяя его границы и влияние на фронтире. Право, Нунциус, не ожидал от тебя подобной фривольности в суждениях".

traits.locale_text: "This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."

"This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."

"This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."

languages.text: «Se trata de un problema imaginario, Comerciante. El Imperium posee una estructura óptima, y sus inagotables recursos ya le sirven bien, expandiendo sus fronteras e influencia por los confines de su territorio. Vaya, Nuncius, no esperaba semejante propensión a la frivolidad por tu parte».
languages.original_text: "This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."

traits.locale_text: «Se trata de un problema imaginario, Comerciante. El Imperium posee una estructura óptima, y sus inagotables recursos ya le sirven bien, expandiendo sus fronteras e influencia por los confines de su territorio. Vaya, Nuncius, no esperaba semejante propensión a la frivolidad por tu parte».

languages.text: “这个问题根本不存在，行商浪人。帝国的结构已然至臻完美，您将那取之不尽的资源用于为帝国扩张版图与影响力，这便是对它们最好的运用。说真的，努恩修斯，我真没料到你会生出这般轻率的想法。”
languages.original_text: "This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."

traits.locale_text: “这个问题根本不存在，行商浪人。帝国的结构已然至臻完美，您将那取之不尽的资源用于为帝国扩张版图与影响力，这便是对它们最好的运用。说真的，努恩修斯，我真没料到你会生出这般轻率的想法。”

languages.text: « Il s'agit d'un problème imaginaire, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. L'Imperium a une structure optimale et vos ressources illimitées le servent déjà fort bien en lui permettant d'étendre ses frontières et son influence dans les lieux les plus reculés. Vraiment, Nuncius, je ne pensais pas entendre des opinions aussi frivoles de ta part. »
languages.original_text: "This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."

traits.locale_text: « Il s'agit d'un problème imaginaire, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. L'Imperium a une structure optimale et vos ressources illimitées le servent déjà fort bien en lui permettant d'étendre ses frontières et son influence dans les lieux les plus reculés. Vraiment, Nuncius, je ne pensais pas entendre des opinions aussi frivoles de ta part. »

languages.text: "Bu sorun hayal ürününden ibaret Hür Tacir. İmparatorluk en uygun şekilde yapılandırılmıştır ve sizin tükenmez kaynaklarınız, sınırlarını ve nüfuzunu genişleterek ona hâlihazırda iyi hizmet etmektedir. Doğrusu Nuncius, senden böyle ciddiyetsiz eğilimler beklemezdim."
languages.original_text: "This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."

traits.locale_text: "Bu sorun hayal ürününden ibaret Hür Tacir. İmparatorluk en uygun şekilde yapılandırılmıştır ve sizin tükenmez kaynaklarınız, sınırlarını ve nüfuzunu genişleterek ona hâlihazırda iyi hizmet etmektedir. Doğrusu Nuncius, senden böyle ciddiyetsiz eğilimler beklemezdim."

languages.text: 「この問題は想像上のものです、ローグトレーダー。帝国は最適に構築されており、あなたの尽きせぬ資源はすでに帝国に十分役立ち、辺境においてその領土と影響力を拡大しています。まったく、ヌンキウス、君からそのような軽率な傾向が出てくるとは思いませんでした」
languages.original_text: "This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."

traits.locale_text: 「この問題は想像上のものです、ローグトレーダー。帝国は最適に構築されており、あなたの尽きせぬ資源はすでに帝国に十分役立ち、辺境においてその領土と影響力を拡大しています。まったく、ヌンキウス、君からそのような軽率な傾向が出てくるとは思いませんでした」

languages.text: "Das ist ein imaginäres Problem, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Das Imperium ist optimal strukturiert und Eure unerschöpflichen Ressourcen dienen ihm schon jetzt gut, um seinen Einfluss auszuweiten. Wirklich, Nuncius, eine derart frivole Ader hätte ich nicht von Euch erwartet."
languages.original_text: "This problem is imaginary, Rogue Trader. The Imperium is optimally structured, and your inexhaustible resources are already serving it well, expanding its borders and influence at the frontier. Truly, Nuncius, I did not expect such frivolous leanings from you."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist ein imaginäres Problem, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Das Imperium ist optimal strukturiert und Eure unerschöpflichen Ressourcen dienen ihm schon jetzt gut, um seinen Einfluss auszuweiten. Wirklich, Nuncius, eine derart frivole Ader hätte ich nicht von Euch erwartet."
